description: Product description Elevate your surroundings with the Pan Aroma Lotus Blossom Air Freshener Trigger Spray. Infused with the delicate and refreshing fragrance of lotus blossoms, this air freshener instantly eliminates odors while adding a floral and calming touch to any space. The easy-to-use trigger spray delivers an even mist, ensuring effective and long-lasting freshness. With this pack of 3 (750ml total), youтАЩll always have a bottle on hand to keep your home or office smelling fresh and inviting. Whether you need to refresh your bedroom, bathroom, or living space, a simple spray is all it takes for an instant burst of floral fragrance. тЬи Transform your space with the soothing scent of lotus blossoms! тЬи Ingredients Spray
